# Mikael Alemu Gorsky

> AI strategist, researcher and educator. Lecturer at the Holon Institute of Technology (HIT), Israel.

## Site structure

- [Homepage](https://mgorsky.net/): Teaching, pro bono, research, and business opportunities
- [Bio](https://mgorsky.net/bio): Short biography and professional links
- [AI for Leaders](https://mgorsky.net/teaching/leaders-and-students): 8-hour executive workshop on AI strategy
- [Agentic Coding](https://mgorsky.net/teaching/agentic-coding): 40-hour semester course on AI-assisted development
- [Change Management](https://mgorsky.net/teaching/change-management): 4-hour executive seminar on AI transformation
- [AI for Seniors](https://mgorsky.net/probono/ai-for-seniors): Free workshop helping older adults adopt AI tools
- [Academic Research](https://mgorsky.net/research/academic): Publications on AI and education
- [The AI Pravda](https://mgorsky.net/theaipravda): LinkedIn newsletter on AI's socio-economic impact (4,200+ subscribers)
- [AI Chronicles](https://mgorsky.net/aichronicles): Daily digest, rolodex, and book project

## Contact

- Email: hello@mgorsky.net
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mgorsky
